name: Beef and Cheese Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Fry ground beef, onion, and green bell pepper in a large frying pan until browned. Drain excess fat.
3. Stir in tomato sauce, green beans, and seasoning. Simmer while preparing the crust.
4. Separate crescent rolls into 8 triangles. Place the base and sides in an ungreased 9-inch pie pan to form a crust.
5. Beat together egg and 1 cup shredded cheese.
6. Spread the mixture over the crust, then evenly distribute it.
7. Spoon hot meat mixture into the crust. Sprinkle with remaining cheese.
8. Bake for 20 to 25 minutes. Serves 6.
